reflections.observation: The wiki vault remains in bridge mode but still reports zero exported memory artifacts, so shared search and provenance are only partially grounded by bridge output.
reflections.pattern: Bridge-mode enablement can outpace actual artifact export availability, creating a gap between configured reconciliation and observable source coverage.
reflections.recommended_action: Keep relying on workspace memory files and explicit wiki pages as primary evidence until bridge exports appear, and treat missing exports as an operational follow-up rather than a memory fact contradiction.
